name: cpas-sandbox
description: CPAS Sandbox Debate System (Cowork_CPAS) — 2-session 16-turn architecture. v0.9.14: Research Queue Filter 추가 — research_queue를 Haiku가 필터링하여 양쪽 에이전트에 {RESEARCH_CONTEXT}로 전달, 공유 연구 컨텍스트 도입. v0.9.13: D-axis redesign — D를 독립축으로 개편 (8단계: D-LL/L/ML/M/MH/H/HH/Q). v0.9.12: Advocate O-3-3 Evidence Conflicts 확장. v0.9.11: Internal Data Integrity Check. v0.9.10: NO PREAMBLE tag fix. v0.9.9: Asymmetric tag system, D-temperature, D-Q phase. Session 1 (Exploratory 8T) + Session 2 (Offensive 8T). Dynamic Data Filters. Log management via cpas-manager plugin.
